title: Calories Burned Walking 30 Minutes (Simple Table by Weight & Pace)
introduction: If you walk for 30 minutes, how many calories do you burn? This quick guide gives realistic calorie ranges by weight and pace so you can plan workouts and fat-loss targets.

sections.heading: 🕒 Quick Answer: 30-Minute Walking Calorie Burn
sections.content:
| Body Weight | Easy Pace (2.5 mph) | Moderate Pace (3.0 mph) | Brisk Pace (3.5-4.0 mph) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 120 lb (54 kg) | 70-90 kcal | 90-110 kcal | 110-140 kcal |
| 150 lb (68 kg) | 85-110 kcal | 110-135 kcal | 135-170 kcal |
| 180 lb (82 kg) | 100-130 kcal | 130-160 kcal | 160-200 kcal |
| 210 lb (95 kg) | 120-150 kcal | 150-185 kcal | 185-230 kcal |

Use the [Calorie Burn Calculator](/tools/calorie-burn-calculator) for a personalized estimate.

sections.heading: How to Burn More in the Same 30 Minutes
sections.content:
| Method | Estimated Burn Increase |
| --- | --- |
| Increase pace by 0.5-1.0 mph | +10-20% |
| Add 2-4% incline | +15-30% |
| Use interval blocks (2 min easy / 1 min brisk) | +10-25% |

Small changes can make short walks much more effective.

sections.heading: 30-Minute Walks and Weekly Fat Loss
sections.content:
A single walk may look small, but weekly totals add up.

| Frequency | Estimated Weekly Burn (150 lb, moderate pace) |
| --- | --- |
| 3 days/week | ~330-405 kcal |
| 5 days/week | ~550-675 kcal |
| 7 days/week | ~770-945 kcal |

Consistent walking plus intake control is what drives progress.

sections.heading: Turn Walking Into a Reliable System
sections.content:
Best practice:

• Keep a minimum daily step floor
• Schedule 30-minute walks like appointments
• Track your meals so exercise burn is not canceled by unplanned calories

Use Eati to log both food and activity in one place.

midArticleCta: Estimate your exact 30-minute walking burn, then track intake in Eati to make sure your effort translates into progress.
conclusion: Walking 30 minutes can burn meaningful calories and is easy to sustain long term. Use realistic burn estimates, increase intensity gradually, and pair your walks with food tracking in Eati for better results.
metaTitle: Calories Burned Walking 30 Minutes: Accurate Burn Table
metaDescription: Find calories burned walking 30 minutes by body weight and pace, with practical tips to increase burn and support weight loss.

faqs.question: Is 30 minutes of walking enough every day?
faqs.answer: Yes, for many people it is a great baseline habit. Results improve when combined with calorie control and consistent weekly activity.

faqs.question: Do I burn more walking outside or on a treadmill?
faqs.answer: Both can be effective. Outdoor terrain and wind may increase burn slightly, while treadmill incline can raise burn significantly.
